title: almaleea subumbellata
intro: Almaleea subumbellata is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the yellow pea-flower or golden pea-flower. The medicinal properties of Almaleea subumbellata include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce water retention and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help to combat infections. Almaleea subumbellata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in the form of a tincture or extract, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health conditions.
